caption: A person holds a graded sports card in a clear plastic protective case, showcasing it to the camera. The card features a baseball player in a dark blue jersey with the word "BREWERS" and "KESTON HIURA" printed at the bottom. The player is depicted in a batting stance against a light blue and grey background. The person's hands grip the sides of the case, slightly tilting the card as they hold it. In the background, a computer monitor displays a livestream layout featuring a man wearing a black t-shirt and a baseball cap. On-screen text and logos include "CASESBREAKS.com" and "BREAKS" in bold red letters. Throughout the sequence, the hand holding the card moves slightly, adjusting the angle of the card to catch the light and better display the player's image and signature.
